description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to build Pinocchio on Windows using Conda. The workflow should trigger on push to master and devel branches and on pull requests. Use a matrix strategy to run a single job on a Windows environment with Clang-CL compiler. In this job, check out the repository and submodules, set up Miniconda with Python 3.7 and a specific environment, install CMake, and then build Pinocchio using CMake and Visual Studio.
